title: Madras High Court orders State to include Dr. BR Ambedkar in TN school curriculum
description: The Madurai Bench of the Madras High Court recently directed the Tamil Nadu government to introduce lessons on Dr. BR Ambedkar in the social science curriculum for students from classes III to X [Rajesh Vs State of Tamil Nadu].In a judgment delivered on April 30, Justice L Victoria Gowri directed that the curriculum must cover Dr. Ambedkar’s role as Chairman of the Drafting Committee of the Constitution of India, his contribution to justice, liberty, equality and fraternity, his role in the free
